time: 54 Cycles before Unfolding (~8 Earth years prior)
title: Mairee Prospects Final Review
desc: Commander Vilde, General Reed, and Professor Adrian Farley finalize the 'Freya' mission plan, selecting the Sickle for the Homestead and the Plateau for industry.

title: The Departure from Solbay
desc: The Freya Fleet assembles at Solbay Station. Oliver Savannen says goodbye to his mother, Laura, as the ships prepare to breach the Fold.

title: Laura's Secret Log
desc: Aboard the FNS Alsvin, Laura Savannen records a final log for Oliver, revealing the true purpose of the COG: to help humanity survive first contact.

title: The Severing
desc: The station hum changes as contact with Sol is severed. Vilde addresses the settlers at Homestead Dome before a gravitic suppressor field is activated by the Directorate.

title: The Fold Dissipates
desc: Lieutenant Frank Muro confirms the Fold is gone. His CIX, Gary, begins exhibiting 'syntactic decay,' claiming the state of the universe is now 'cleaner.'

title: The Dáinn Intercepts
desc: Captain Westhoff defies Directorate orders to return to orbit, setting an intercept course for the unresponsive FNS Brisinger.

title: The Grid Intervenes
desc: Susana Perera suffers a violent seizure. The local Grid interface detects the event and automatically sedates her with neuro-regulators.

title: Corbin's Ultimatum
desc: The Dáinn is plagued by artificial gravity waves. Corbin threatens to cut Commander Vilde’s life support unless Westhoff reverses course. The Brisinger sends an 'S' signal.

title: Assignment to the Delta
desc: Centurion Jax assigns Kirsten Strand to secure a survey team in the Delta, a move designed to remove a political rival.

title: The Stingray Enters
desc: Hale and Kiran board the derelict Brisinger via a maintenance shaft. Meanwhile, at the Homestead, Ian Perera helps Oliver bypass the Grid to play Mechdroid.

title: Grief at The Leaf
desc: After losing recruit Ahmed Nasr to the bog, Kirsten Strand and Sarah Farley clash over the survival of the survey team in the hostile Delta.

title: Cymatics and Voices
desc: Muro realizes the planet is using the station’s power grid as an antenna. Gary the CIX begins speaking with Muro's own voice and speech patterns.

title: The Masonic Ritual
desc: Ulre Corbin is ambushed by the 'Masons' at Ivaldi Base and forced to witness a vision of the city Væra in the Star Chamber.

title: Strand’s Last Stand
desc: As DROP Seven is evacuated, Kirsten Strand is left behind and overwhelmed by a Dartswarm. She is seemingly carried away by an angelic figure.

title: It's Raining Below
desc: Sarah Farley finds the downed Hopper but is forced into a confrontation with Centurion Jax, leading to her being shot down and labeled rogue.

title: Jensen's Awakening
desc: Joana examines Jensen, a ranger who returned changed from the Delta. He dies after warning that 'the soil is waking up.'

title: The Handover
desc: Captain Westhoff surrenders the Dáinn to Corbin and is reassigned to the Plateau. Ionie Jia is promoted to Captain and told to find the 'Captain's Log.'

title: The Edge of Everything
desc: Alistair and Stacey calibrate the Stingray and share a moment of intimacy before the Brisinger begins its hot descent to Freya Port.

title: The Endstart
desc: The Brisinger crashes. Oliver retrieves the COG Egg and meets Læsa.
